# Stephanie Rendon

> Stephanie Rendon is a bilingual (English/Spanish) strategic communications leader based in New York City with 14+ years of experience in media relations, brand strategy, crisis communications, and community engagement for mission-driven organizations. She is available for freelance consulting with nonprofits, NGOs, education institutions, and public health organizations.

## About

Stephanie currently serves as Head of Marketing & Communications at School in the Square, a PreK–12 public charter school network in Washington Heights and Inwood, NYC, serving 800+ students through a dual-language English/Spanish model.

Previously, she led brand strategy, media relations, and editorial at Florida International University's Robert Stempel College of Public Health & Social Work, and shaped national communications for the American Red Cross and SOS Children's Villages.

Her work has been featured in The New York Times, NBC News, CBS News, The Today Show, CNN, The Washington Post, The Associated Press, and Bloomberg.

## Core Specialties

- Strategic communications consulting
- Crisis communications and disaster response messaging
- Media relations and earned media strategy
- Brand strategy and narrative development
- Bilingual (English/Spanish) communications
- Community engagement and stakeholder communications
- Campaign development and digital strategy
- Nonprofit and NGO communications
- Public health and education communications
- Media training

## Career Highlights

- Leads marketing, communications, and community engagement for School in the Square, a PreK–12 charter network in Washington Heights and Inwood
- Ran media strategy at the American Red Cross and supported national crisis and disaster response communications
- Directed communications for SOS Children's Villages, landing coverage in NBC, CNN, Reuters, and The Associated Press
- Managed FIU Stempel College's marketing across brand, editorial, media, social, and advertising
- Coordinated a digital campaign with Huffington Post and Johnson & Johnson that doubled website traffic
- Placed panelists at the Clinton Global Initiative and United Nations Foundation events

## Featured Media Coverage

- [NBC News: Shot During Cookies and Milk: A Syrian Boy's Story](https://www.nbcnews.com/storyline/syrias-suffering-families/shot-during-cookies-milk-syrian-boys-story-n266356): Feature on a Syrian boy's recovery with support from SOS Children's Villages
- [NBC News: Child War Survivor to Syria's Children: Don't Give Up](https://www.nbcnews.com/storyline/syrias-children/child-war-survivor-syrias-children-dont-give-n51161): Story of a Liberian war survivor sharing hope with Syrian children
- [TODAY: Red Cross urges people to donate blood amid coronavirus concerns](https://www.today.com/health/red-cross-urges-people-donate-blood-amid-coronavirus-concerns-t175665): Coverage of Red Cross blood donation campaign during COVID-19
- [New York Times: Hurricane Season 2020](https://www.nytimes.com/2020/05/21/climate/hurricane-season-2020-noaa.html): Article featuring FIU experts on disaster preparedness
- [CBS News Miami: FIU stages largest disaster drill in the state](https://www.cbsnews.com/miami/news/florida-international-university-stages-largest-disaster-drill-in-the-state/): Coverage of FIU's large-scale disaster drill

## Portfolio Samples

- [FIU students get hands-on experience in large-scale disaster response](https://news.fiu.edu/2024/fiu-students-get-hands-on-experience-in-large-scale-disaster-response): Press release for FIU disaster management program
- [Professor named social work educator of the year](https://news.fiu.edu/2025/social-work-professor-named-educator-of-the-year): Feature story on award-winning FIU professor
- [Major Agencies and Networks Support SOS Children's Villages PSA](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/major-agencies-and-networks-support-a-new-psa-that-emphasizes-sos-childrens-villages-dedication-to-supporting-vulnerable-children-worldwide-300347663.html): National PSA campaign press release
- [2024 FIU Stempel College Impact Report](https://issuu.com/fiupublications/docs/4965759993_stmpl_2024annualreport-issuu): Annual report (editor and producer)
- [2023 FIU Stempel College Public Health Impact Report](https://issuu.com/fiupublications/docs/stmpl_2023_public_health_impact_report_4965759993): Annual report (editor and producer)
